name: libclaude
description: Wrap the local claude CLI in a TypeScript Node API, with a transport-pluggable typed RPC layer and a React web UI.

scripts.check: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/rpc && tsc --noEmit -p packages/react && tsc --noEmit -p apps/server && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web
